question.title: CNS-028v2 iter-2 — plan v3 absorption of iter-1 3B+2W (5 absorbs)
question.body:
Plan v3 absorption of iter-1 verdict PARTIAL (3B + 2W):

B1 drift fix: §3 schema line 97 array → object sync (§1+§2 uyumlu); policy_cost_tracking.schema strict_freshness: bool default false eklendi; fencing-state.schema inventory'ye geri alındı.

B2 lease/fencing expiry semantics: COORDINATION.md 'Expiry Authority' subsection — effective_expires_at = heartbeat_at + expiry_seconds; takeover threshold grace sonrası; CLAIM_CONFLICT_GRACE yeni error variant; owner grace içinde heartbeat → claim revival; in-flight step stale fencing → ClaimStaleFencingError; max_claims_per_agent = non-expired only; multi-resource atomic unsupported v1 (FAZ-C scope); cleanup caller-driven.

B3 benchmark typed artifact: review_ai_flow.v1.json B0 contract pin (B6 runtime); yeni review-findings.schema.v1.json; agent-adapter-contract.schema::capabilities[] enum +review_findings; output_envelope.output_ref üstünden transport (PR-A4b artifact pattern reuse).

W1 metrics control plane: policy_metrics.v1.json 3. policy (dormant); labels_advanced.enabled schema-backed.

W2 catalog loader: config.py::load_default +kind='catalog' (~12 satır extension); bundled ao_kernel/defaults/catalogs/price-catalog.v1.json. B2 runtime'a sürüklenmiyor.

Plan v3 yeni boyutlar: 4 docs + 8 schemas + 3 policies + 2 bundled + 1 config delta + ~35 test, ~1700 satır. Yeni evidence kind: 0. Yeni adapter capability: 1. Yeni core dep: 0.
